title: lanonia batoensis
intro: Lanonia batoensis, also known as Bato lanonia or Bato lanoni, is a plant species in the family Myrtaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lanonia batoensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant is often prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or decoction, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
